title: Summonable Steve
description: A Summonable Steve boss that can be spawned and fought. He mimics player behavior.
body:
**Welcome to Summonable Steve!**

Summonable Steve is a mod where you can summon a boss mob named "Steve". He has the default Steve skin, as he is meant to represent you.

**Steve's Behavior**

1. Steve will walk around randomly and defeat any pigs, cows, sheep, and chicken, as he is just like the player and needs his food.
2. When the player is near him, he will stare at them until they leave. (Meant as a threat)
3. When attacked, Steve will hunt down the player from a far distance until they are defeated.
4. Steve is very powerful and has a lot of health and defense. Be prepared if you wish to fight him.
5. When defeated, steve will drop "Steve's Sword". Steve's Sword is extremely powerful and has a high enchantability. Steve's sword is made of very strong diamonds, but cannot be upgraded to netherite due to it's immense power.

**Summoning Steve**

- Steve can be summoned by placing a blue wool, a light blue wool on top, and finally, a player head.
- Player heads will spawn on the floor at any defeated player's location.
- Steve will not de-spawn. Once summoned, Steve will not attack the player, but once attacked, he must be defeated for the player to be able to relax.


**Version Support:**
Currently, Summonable Steve is availible for the following versions:

- 1.21.1 NeoForge

I am working on adding newer versions for you all to enjoy.

**Future Updates:**

Here is a list of planned features for Summonable Steve:

- Steve will be able to chop trees and mine blocks
- Steve will be able to provoke mobs (Not the Player)
- Please leave any suggestions in the Comments

**If you'd like, you can download this mod off of Curseforge instead. I recommend Modrinth, but it is your choice if you prefer Curseforge.**

[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/summonable-steve](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/summonable-steve)

**Create a Server with Summonable Steve! Use this link to get 25% off your first purchase:**

https://url-shortener.curseforge.com/G5e0U

Note: This is not an ad link. It will take you directly to BisectHosting.
